options.name: <pattern_list>
options.description: Returns only those libraries in the collection whose name matches one or more of the patterns specified in the pattern_list argument

options.name: -filter
options.description: Filters the collection with the specified expression

options.name: -nocase
options.description: Pattern matching is not case sensitive

options.name: -of_objects
options.description: Creates a collection of all library pins associated with the specified library cells or pins

options.name: -quiet
options.description: Suppresses all error and warning messages generated when the get_lib_pins command is run

options.name: -regexp
options.description: Treats the specified patterns as a regular expression patterns
